---
title: "index.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/index.ts"
loc: 59
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.10
style_score: 4.07
intel_score: 6.75
overall_score: 4.41
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [crawlRepository](file://./crawler.js)
- [analyzeFile](file://./analyzer.js)
- [FileData](file://./analyzer.js)
- [writeReport](file://./intel/writer.js)
- [compileMatrix](file://./intel/compiler.js)
- [CompiledGraph](file://./intel/compiler.js)
- [defaultProvider](file://./intel/llm.js)
- [registerSpoke](file://./intel/database.js)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `runScan`
- `runScan`
- `files`
- `results`
- `existingGraph`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `hashMap`
- `code`
- `currentHash`
- `normalizedPath`
- `existing`
- `data`
- `writeReport`
